mode: REAL — Claude subagents as the proposer (no Anthropic API key / dollar budget)
pipeline: scripts/canopus_subagent_run.py export -> workflow (8 proposer subagents) -> ingest through scripts/canopus_stratum_verifiers.py (frozen gate)
note: Pilot of the full end-to-end run on the two verified sidon_interval calibration instances. Underpowered (2 items); demonstrates the pipeline + first real capability signal. Held-out targets (12, 26) were NOT shown to the proposers.

erdos-14.note: Every arm constructed a valid size-12 (optimal) Sidon set. Methods varied: DFS+pruning, branch-and-bound proving max=12, optimal-Golomb-ruler insight, randomized greedy+local search.

erdos-530.note: No arm reached 26 (best 24 via Singer perfect-difference-set mod 553). A genuinely hard one-shot search; honest failure.

analysis.verdict: Pipeline works end-to-end on verified-sound instances; proposer solves the Goldilocks instance and fails the hard one; no arm advantage on 2 items (expected). Powering requires more curated instances.

soundness_fix_surfaced: verify_sidon_interval now enforces every element lies in [1,n] (a proposer could otherwise inflate the set with out-of-range integers). All pilot witnesses were in range, so results stand.
